critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully split DailySessionsPage.jsx from 3160 lines into 11 modular files
DailySessionsPage.jsx (573 lines) - Main orchestrator with state management
SessionSidebar.jsx (162 lines) - Calendar and session list
SessionHeader.jsx (66 lines) - Session title, status, and action buttons
MapToolbar.jsx (215 lines) - Drawing tools, zoom controls, and mode buttons
MapCanvas.jsx (329 lines) - Map rendering with zones, drawing, and interaction
MapZoneCards.jsx (178 lines) - Zone cards grid and changes view
DensityTab.jsx (280 lines) - Prayer times, KPIs, zone grid, heatmap
StatsTab.jsx (194 lines) - Statistics with donut chart and category breakdown
constants.js (32 lines) - API URL, zone types, change labels, prayer times
utils.js (158 lines) - Helper functions for auth, geometry, density calculations
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data on Feb 18 and Feb 19
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring of DailySessionsPage.jsx tested successfully in iteration 23. The monolithic 3160-line file was split into 11 modular files under /app/frontend/src/pages/DailySessions/. All components render correctly: SessionSidebar (calendar, session list), SessionHeader (title, status, actions), MapToolbar (Pan/Draw/Edit/Shapes modes, zoom), MapCanvas (floor image with zone polygons), MapZoneCards (zone grid, changes view), DensityTab (prayer times, KPIs, zone density, heatmap), StatsTab (KPIs, donut chart, category table), and Dialogs (Notes, NewSession, Batch, ZoneEdit, NewZone, Compare). Test floor: طابق البدروم. Test sessions: Feb 18 and Feb 19 (both draft status).
